---
title: "hypothetical_proteins_optimization"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(lpSolve)

optimization <- read.csv("optimization_data_hypotheticals.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```


## Scenario 3v2

```{r}
# =========================
# Expanded Scenario 2 v2
# Existing products: ±50% bounds
# New hypothetical products: only allowed for Category == "Soy" or "Fish"
# Total meals fixed
# Total cost cannot increase
# Primary: maximize sustainable spend
# Secondary: minimize GHG
# Additional caps:
#   total Soy meals  <= 3
#   total Fish meals <= 19
# =========================

# Make a plain data.frame in case tibble causes any issues downstream
optimization <- as.data.frame(optimization)


# -----------------------------------------
# 5. Define baseline vectors
# -----------------------------------------
x0 <- optimization$Menu_freq_f25
n  <- nrow(optimization)

# Identify existing vs new hypothetical rows
is_existing <- x0 > 0
is_new_zero <- x0 == 0

is_soy  <- optimization$Category == "Soy"
is_fish <- optimization$Category == "Fish"

# New hypothetical rows are only allowed if they are Soy or Fish
is_new_allowed <- is_new_zero & (is_soy | is_fish)

# Any other baseline-zero row is locked at zero
is_new_locked <- is_new_zero & !is_new_allowed

# -----------------------------------------
# 6. Sustainable flag and accounting vectors
# -----------------------------------------
sus_flag <- ifelse(
  tolower(trimws(optimization$Default_sus)) %in% c("yes", "y", "true", "1"),
  1,
  0
)

portion_lb <- optimization$Expected_lb_meat_portion

# Effective price per lb used for costing, based on Default_sus
price_lb <- ifelse(
  sus_flag == 1,
  optimization$Sustainable_price_lb,
  optimization$Conventional_price_lb
)

# Per menu appearance accounting
cost_per_appearance <- price_lb * portion_lb

# Sustainable spend only counts when Default_sus == yes
sus_cost_per_appearance <- optimization$Sustainable_price_lb * portion_lb * sus_flag

# GHG per menu appearance
ghg_per_appearance <- optimization$Conventional_GHG_per_lb * portion_lb

# -----------------------------------------
# 7. Baseline totals
# -----------------------------------------
baseline_meals <- sum(x0)
baseline_cost  <- sum(cost_per_appearance * x0)
baseline_sus   <- sum(sus_cost_per_appearance * x0)
baseline_ghg   <- sum(ghg_per_appearance * x0)

# -----------------------------------------
# 8. Bounds
# -----------------------------------------
# Existing items:
#   if baseline is 1 or 2 -> keep fixed at baseline
#   if baseline is 3 or more -> apply integer-safe +/- 50%
#
# New hypothetical items:
#   allowed only for Soy and Fish rows with baseline 0
#   controlled by category caps below

lb <- ifelse(
  is_existing,
  ifelse(x0 <= 2, x0, ceiling(0.5 * x0)),
  0
)

ub <- ifelse(
  is_existing,
  ifelse(x0 <= 2, x0, floor(1.5 * x0)),
  0
)

# New hypothetical Soy/Fish rows can enter
# These are row-level maxima only; category-level caps are added below
ub[is_new_allowed & is_soy]  <- 3
ub[is_new_allowed & is_fish] <- 19

# Other baseline-zero rows remain locked at 0
ub[is_new_locked] <- 0

# Safety check
if (any(lb > ub)) {
  bad_rows <- which(lb > ub)
  stop(
    paste(
      "Some rows have lower bound > upper bound. Rows:",
      paste(bad_rows, collapse = ", ")
    )
  )
}

# -----------------------------------------
# 9. Build base constraints
# -----------------------------------------
# Decision variables are integer menu frequencies x_i

A   <- matrix(0, nrow = 0, ncol = n)
dir <- character(0)
rhs <- numeric(0)

# 9a. Total meals fixed
A_meals <- matrix(1, nrow = 1, ncol = n)
dir_meals <- "="
rhs_meals <- baseline_meals

A   <- rbind(A, A_meals)
dir <- c(dir, dir_meals)
rhs <- c(rhs, rhs_meals)

# 9b. Item-level lower bounds: x_i >= lb_i
A_lb <- diag(n)
dir_lb <- rep(">=", n)
rhs_lb <- lb

A   <- rbind(A, A_lb)
dir <- c(dir, dir_lb)
rhs <- c(rhs, rhs_lb)

# 9c. Item-level upper bounds: x_i <= ub_i
A_ub <- diag(n)
dir_ub <- rep("<=", n)
rhs_ub <- ub

A   <- rbind(A, A_ub)
dir <- c(dir, dir_ub)
rhs <- c(rhs, rhs_ub)

# 9d. Total Soy cap <= 3 meals
A_soy <- matrix(as.numeric(is_soy), nrow = 1)
dir_soy <- "<="
rhs_soy <- 3

A   <- rbind(A, A_soy)
dir <- c(dir, dir_soy)
rhs <- c(rhs, rhs_soy)

# 9e. Total Fish cap <= 19 meals
A_fish <- matrix(as.numeric(is_fish), nrow = 1)
dir_fish <- "<="
rhs_fish <- 19

A   <- rbind(A, A_fish)
dir <- c(dir, dir_fish)
rhs <- c(rhs, rhs_fish)

# -----------------------------------------
# 9f. Category-level constraints
# Hybrid rule for small categories:
#   baseline 1-2  -> fixed at baseline
#   baseline 3-4  -> baseline +/- 1 meal
#   baseline >= 5 -> +/- 50%
#
# Exclude Soy and Fish from this block because they already
# have their own special treatment.
# -----------------------------------------
category_baselines <- optimization %>%
  group_by(Category) %>%
  summarise(
    baseline_cat_meals = sum(Menu_freq_f25, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!(Category %in% c("Soy", "Fish")))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(category_baselines))) {
  cat_name <- category_baselines$Category[i]
  cat_base <- category_baselines$baseline_cat_meals[i]

  cat_vec <- as.numeric(optimization$Category == cat_name)

  if (cat_base <= 2) {
    cat_lb <- cat_base
    cat_ub <- cat_base
 # } else if (cat_base <= 4) {
 #   cat_lb <- cat_base - 1
 #   cat_ub <- cat_base + 1
  } else {
    cat_lb <- ceiling(0.5 * cat_base)
    cat_ub <- floor(1.5 * cat_base)
  }

  A <- rbind(A, cat_vec)
  dir <- c(dir, ">=")
  rhs <- c(rhs, cat_lb)

  A <- rbind(A, cat_vec)
  dir <- c(dir, "<=")
  rhs <- c(rhs, cat_ub)
}

# -----------------------------------------
# 10. Cost cap
# -----------------------------------------
cost_slack <- 0.0
sus_slack  <- 0.0

A_costcap   <- rbind(A, cost_per_appearance)
dir_costcap <- c(dir, "<=")
rhs_costcap <- c(rhs, baseline_cost * (1 + cost_slack))

# -----------------------------------------
# 11. Stage 1: maximize sustainable spend
# -----------------------------------------
sol_stage1 <- lp(
  direction   = "max",
  objective.in = sus_cost_per_appearance,
  const.mat   = A_costcap,
  const.dir   = dir_costcap,
  const.rhs   = rhs_costcap,
  all.int     = TRUE
)

if (sol_stage1$status != 0) {
  stop(
    "Expanded S2v2 Stage 1 infeasible. Try checking the new row setup, caps, or use a tiny cost_slack."
  )
}

x_stage1 <- sol_stage1$solution
opt_sus  <- sum(sus_cost_per_appearance * x_stage1)

# -----------------------------------------
# 12. Stage 2: minimize GHG while preserving sustainable spend
# -----------------------------------------
A_susfloor   <- rbind(A_costcap, sus_cost_per_appearance)
dir_susfloor <- c(dir_costcap, ">=")
rhs_susfloor <- c(rhs_costcap, opt_sus * (1 - sus_slack))

sol_stage2 <- lp(
  direction   = "min",
  objective.in = ghg_per_appearance,
  const.mat   = A_susfloor,
  const.dir   = dir_susfloor,
  const.rhs   = rhs_susfloor,
  all.int     = TRUE
)

if (sol_stage2$status != 0) {
  stop(
    "Expanded S2v2 Stage 2 infeasible. Try a small sus_slack such as 0.001."
  )
}

x_final <- sol_stage2$solution

# -----------------------------------------
# 13. Summary function
# -----------------------------------------
summ <- function(x) {
  total_cost <- sum(cost_per_appearance * x)
  sus_spend  <- sum(sus_cost_per_appearance * x)
  sus_pct    <- if (total_cost > 0) sus_spend / total_cost else NA_real_
  total_ghg  <- sum(ghg_per_appearance * x)

  c(
    meals      = sum(x),
    total_cost = total_cost,
    sus_spend  = sus_spend,
    sus_pct    = sus_pct,
    total_ghg  = total_ghg
  )
}

scenario_table_s2v2_expanded <- rbind(
  baseline = summ(x0),
  stage1_max_sus_no_cost_increase = summ(x_stage1),
  stage2_min_ghg_given_cost_and_sus = summ(x_final)
)

print(scenario_table_s2v2_expanded)

```

```{r}
# -----------------------------------------
# 14. Attach optimization results to dataframe
# -----------------------------------------
optimization <- optimization %>%
  mutate(
    freq_baseline = Menu_freq_f25,
    freq_opt_s2v2_expanded = x_final,
    delta_s2v2_expanded = freq_opt_s2v2_expanded - freq_baseline,
    baseline_cost_contribution = cost_per_appearance * freq_baseline
  )

# -----------------------------------------
# 15. Category totals
# -----------------------------------------
category_totals_s2v2_expanded <- optimization %>%
  group_by(Category) %>%
  summarise(
    baseline_meals = sum(freq_baseline, na.rm = TRUE),
    opt_meals_s2v2_expanded = sum(freq_opt_s2v2_expanded, na.rm = TRUE),
    delta_meals_s2v2_expanded = sum(delta_s2v2_expanded, na.rm = TRUE),

    baseline_share = baseline_meals / sum(optimization$freq_baseline, na.rm = TRUE),
    opt_share_s2v2_expanded = opt_meals_s2v2_expanded / sum(optimization$freq_opt_s2v2_expanded, na.rm = TRUE),

    baseline_cost = sum(baseline_cost_contribution, na.rm = TRUE),
    opt_cost = sum(opt_cost_contribution, na.rm = TRUE),

    baseline_sus_spend = sum(baseline_sus_spend, na.rm = TRUE),
    opt_sus_spend = sum(opt_sus_spend, na.rm = TRUE),

    baseline_ghg = sum(baseline_ghg_contribution, na.rm = TRUE),
    opt_ghg = sum(opt_ghg_contribution, na.rm = TRUE),

    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(opt_meals_s2v2_expanded))

print(category_totals_s2v2_expanded)

# -----------------------------------------
# 17. Export outputs
# -----------------------------------------

write.csv(
  optimization,
  file = "optimization_scenario3v2.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
